title: Better Buckets
description: Makes the Lava Bucket and Water Bucket look more realistic!
body:
This is my overlay for lava bucket and water bucket textures, this pack makes the buckets really stand out from my point of view.

I really enjoy using this pack and I feel it looks amazing when playing survival or even PvP.

Hope you enjoy it as much as I do, see you in the future!
(ps discord is linked)
